name: Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 2 each Inch Cube Salt Pork; Diced
2 cups Corn Kernels; Fresh or Frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the salt pork slowly in a deep pan until the fat has melted and the pieces are brown.
2. Pour off all but 2 tablespoons of the fat.
3. Add the onion, cook for 5 minutes.
4. Add the potatoes and water, cover and cook until the potatoes are just tender.
5. Add the corn and milk, cook for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Before serving, add the butter, salt, and pepper to taste and reheat.
